summary: Correctness review: 0 critical, 0 warning, 0 info findings

findings.description: PII column 'first_name' appears unmasked in DML for non-staging table 'dim_customer'
findings.suggested_fix: Apply masking: SHA256(CAST(first_name AS BYTES)) or use BigQuery column-level policy tags
